name: Biron

skills.name: Fearless Chariot
skills.description: Accumulates charge when Basic Attacks or unenhanced skills land hits, for up to 3 bars of charge.While having at least 1 bar, Basic Attack hits recover Health.Using Skill 1, the Ultimate, or an enhanced Basic Attack from Skill 2 will spend 1 bar.

skills.name: Electrifying Charge
skills.description: Swings his weapon twice in the target direction, dealing damage andrecovering Health with every hit.While charged, deals more damage and recovers more Health.

skills.name: Storm Strike
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in his path whilegaining an enhanced Basic Attack that deals damage and slows targetsWhile charged, the next Basic Attack deals more damage, and the sloweffect is changed to a launch effect.

skills.name: Force Field Suppression
skills.description: Gains a shield while damaging and slowing nearby enemiesWhile charged, the skill deals more damage, grants a stronger shield, andproduces a spark that deals damage to nearby enemies while stealingMovement Speed from enemy heroes.

tips: Biron (Tank): Tier A on international ranked — 48.43% WR.
Build core: Meteor, Boots of Fortitude, Nettle Gauntlet.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 48.43%, pick 0.83%, ban 0.09%, popularity tier A.
Counters Dun, Wukong · Weak into Lady Sun, Sun Bin.

faqs.question: Is Biron good in current season?
faqs.answer: Biron is Tier A Tank with 48.43% win rate, 0.83% pick rate, and 0.09% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Biron build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Meteor, Boots of Fortitude, Nettle Gauntlet, Pure Sky, Glacial Buckler, Boots of Resistance. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Biron?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Biron: Lady Sun, Sun Bin. Biron is strong into Dun, Wukong.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Dun, Wukong. Countered by: Lady Sun, Sun Bin.
